sections.paragraph:
Original: משׁל

Transliteration: mâshal

Phonetic: maw-shal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to rule, have dominion, reign
    1. (Qal) to rule, have dominion
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to rule
      2. to exercise dominion

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1259

Part(s) of speech: Verb
